page: Microsoft Azure DC64es_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCEV6 family. It is equipped with 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding an allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for external block storage attachments. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance.

The hardware profile offers a balanced resource density of 4.0 GB of memory per dedicated core. This allocation aligns with general-purpose and memory-conscious workloads that do not require local NVMe drives or hardware acceleration. Suitable workloads include relational databases, enterprise applications, and memory-optimized tasks that rely on network-attached Premium Storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64es_v6 is an x86_64 server instance from the DCEV6 family, utilizing 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced resource ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It features no local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. The instance does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration is engineered for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and moderate memory density, such as relational databases, enterprise application servers, and general-purpose business workloads that leverage network-attached storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC64es_v6 is a DCEV6 family server featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, designed for enterprise workloads.
